data.title: Gala Games reveals Jaxel Mystery Box with rare NFT rewards for Carnival Grounds. Limited stock starts from July 17, 2025.
data.description: Gala Games has introduced the Jaxel Mystery Box, which includes unique NFTs along with additional perks for the Carnival Grounds. The limited edition boxes will be up for grabs starting on July 17, 2025. Interested parties should act fast as there is a limited supply of these exclusive boxes.

data.title: RaySearch's Q2 2025 interim report presentation on August 8 at 10am CEST, report out at 07:45am that day.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, at 10:00 am CEST, RaySearch will present its interim report for the second quarter of 2025 in Stockholm. The report will be released at 07:45 am on the same day. Analysts, investors, and the media are welcome to attend.

data.title: ENEY launches global sales, showcasing Japanese craftsmanship and sustainable design with collections PIXEL and KIHEI. Expanding worldwide with support from select retail partners.
data.description: ENEY, a popular Japanese jewelry brand, has recently begun selling its renowned collections PIXEL and KIHEI worldwide through ENEY GLOBAL. Renowned for its blend of traditional craftsmanship and sustainable design, ENEY is rapidly expanding its reach, with backing from key retail allies. The brand's move towards global sales was initiated in Tokyo on July 18, 2025.

data.title: Eric Wynalek appointed CEO of FYTT by Summit Venture Studio, aiming for high-growth phase in athlete development.
data.description: Today, Summit Venture Studio (SVS) revealed Eric Wynalek as the new CEO of FYTT, a sports performance technology firm that aims to improve athlete development results. The announcement was made in Lehi, Utah on July 17, 2025. SVS is a company focused on supporting startups in various industries, with this particular appointment highlighting their commitment to fostering innovation in the athletic sector.

data.title: China Mobile International activates SJC2 submarine cable, spanning 10,500km to boost connectivity in Asia-Pacific.
data.description: On July 16, 2025, China Mobile International Limited (CMI) announced the official activation of the Southeast Asia-Japan Cable 2 (SJC2) in Hong Kong. This new submarine cable system covers a distance of 10,500 kilometers and aims to transform connectivity in the Asia-Pacific region.
